title: PVPMode
description: Allow players to manage their pvp mode
body:
# Introduction  
Simple plugin to manage your pvp mode(peace,default,insane).  
**Peace mode**: You can't attack and no one will damage you.  
**Default mode**: Default. You can attack and will take damage.  
**Insane mode**: More damage to self and other player.  
You can set the price and timer when change to insane mode  
In-game menu supports! (From v1.7)  
Optional dependent plugins:  
1. Vault  
2. PlaceholderAPI  
PlaceholderAPI: %pvpmode_mode% Show your mode  

# Image
![cmd](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/28/Mid8V1P2ZzWNHqv.png)  
![message](https://s2.loli.net/2022/05/28/ZRkJ3Mniob2TPA1.png)  

# Commands
aliase: pvp  
/PVPMode Open the menu.  
/PVPMode help View help.  
/PVPMode info <player> Check your or player's mode.  
/PVPMode <0/1/2/peace/default/insane> switch mode.  
/PVPMode <0/1/2/peace/default/insane> <player> switch player's mode.  
/PVPMode create <world> <mode> Create a world to lock the mode.  
/PVPMode remove <world> Remove the world.  
/PVPMode mode <world> <mode> Set the world's mode.  
/PVPMode reload Reload the config.  
0 = peace, 1 = default, 2 = insane  

# Permissions
pvpmode.admin Admin commands  
pvpmode.insane To use /pvp 2 or /pvp insane  

# Usage
Put PVPMode.jar into your server's plugins folder.  
If you want to use Vault and PlaceholderAPI functions. Also put them inside. (Optional)  

 ![bstats](https://bstats.org/signatures/bukkit/pvpmode.svg)
